title: Financial Literacy, Critical Life Skill – SEC - FinancialEDGE
description: The Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has stated that it firmly believes that financial literacy is not merely an academic subject; but a life skill, and indeed, a survival tool in today’s complex and rapidly evolving economy. Director General of the SEC, Dr. Emomotimi Agama stated this at the handing over ceremony of the reviewed
html: The Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has stated that it firmly believes that financial literacy is not merely an academic subject; but a life skill, and indeed, a survival tool in today’s complex and rapidly evolving economy.
